tools.name: warmup_calculator
tools.description: Calculate a barbell warmup ramp for any lift. Returns a structured set of warmup sets leading up to the work weight, with decreasing reps as weight increases. Based on standard barbell warmup methodology used in Starting Strength coaching. Powered by CoachSync.io.

tools.name: plate_loader
tools.description: Calculate which plates to load on each side of the barbell to reach a target weight. Supports custom bar weights and custom plate inventories for home gyms. Powered by CoachSync.io.

tools.name: novice_lp_generator
tools.description: Generate a structured 4-week novice linear progression program for a new or early-intermediate barbell trainee. Based on the Starting Strength model: squat every session, alternating press/bench, deadlift progressing to power cleans. Takes lifter profile (sex, bodyweight, age, training days) and opt
